title: Terminal Power-Ups
description: Level up with more commands: mkdir, touch, cat, and friends. You're basically a hacker now! (A friendly one.)

steps.instruction: Let's create a projects folder! Type: mkdir projects
steps.hint: Type 'mkdir projects' and press Enter to create a new folder called 'projects'.

steps.instruction: Now create a file inside it! Type: touch projects/my-first-file.txt
Want to read a file? Type: cat Documents/penguin-facts.txt — This prints the file's contents!
steps.hint: Type 'cat Documents/penguin-facts.txt' and press Enter to read the file.

steps.instruction: Cool penguin facts! 🐧 Now let's copy that file: type: cp Documents/penguin-facts.txt projects/
steps.hint: Type 'cp Documents/penguin-facts.txt projects/' and press Enter.

steps.instruction: Verify it worked! Type: ls projects/ — You should see both files in there.
